code:
sequenceDiagram Note over Content timeline: [HealthTech_PatientRecords]] is null
[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]] is null Note over Device timeline: [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]].[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]] is "available" Content timeline ->> Device timeline: mapAsync(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) Note over Content timeline: [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]] is null
[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]] is non-null Note over Device timeline: [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]].[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]] is "unavailable" Device timeline ->> Content timeline: mapAsync(HealthTech_PatientRecords) response Note over Device timeline: [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]].[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]] is "unavailable" Note over Content timeline: [HealthTech_PatientRecords]] is non-null
[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]] is null Content timeline ->> Device timeline: unmap(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) Note over Content timeline: [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]] is null
[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]] is null Note over Device timeline: [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]].[HealthTech_PatientRecords]] is "available"

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个医疗科技系统的时序图，展示Content timeline和Device timeline之间的交互。初始状态是PatientRecords和DiagnosticEngine都为空，但LabAnalyzer的EMR_Sync是可用的。
明白了，我先在Content timeline和Device timeline上标注初始状态。接下来第一个交互是什么？
第一步是Content timeline向Device timeline发起mapAsync调用，映射HIPAA_Vault。执行后，LabAnalyzer变为空，DiagnosticEngine变为非空，同时Device timeline上的HIPAA_Vault状态变为unavailable。
好的，我添加了从Content timeline到Device timeline的mapAsync(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)箭头，并更新了两侧的状态注释。下一步呢？
接下来Device timeline需要回传响应，用mapAsync调用PatientRecords。这时候Device timeline上的HIPAA_Vault状态要标记为unavailable——等等，让我确认一下，应该是HIPAA_Vault自身的状态，不是嵌套的。

我注意到这里有个问题，你刚才说HIPAA_Vault状态，但按照流程应该是Device timeline上的HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault状态。不过我在检查时发现，注释里写的是[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault].[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]，这看起来像是重复了，是不是应该是[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer].[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]或者其他组合？
你说得对，我重新理一下。在Device timeline回传响应后，状态应该是[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]本身的状态变为unavailable，不需要双重嵌套。另外Content timeline这边，PatientRecords变为非空，DiagnosticEngine要重置为null。
已修正。我添加了Device timeline到Content timeline的mapAsync(HealthTech_PatientRecords) response箭头，Content timeline上PatientRecords非空、DiagnosticEngine为空，Device timeline上HIPAA_Vault标记为unavailable。最后一步是什么？
最后一步是Content timeline向Device timeline发起unmap操作，解除DiagnosticEngine的映射。完成后，Content timeline上的EMR_Sync清空，Device timeline上的DiagnosticEngine与PatientRecords关联状态变为available。

完成了。我添加了最后的unmap(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)箭头，Content timeline上EMR_Sync为null，Device timeline上DiagnosticEngine.PatientRecords标记为available。整个时序图现在完整展示了HIPAA_Vault映射、PatientRecords响应和DiagnosticEngine解除映射的完整流程。
